# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-apis
spec:
  hosts:
  - api1.example.com
  - api2.example.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  - number: 80
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-db
spec:
  hosts:
  - db.example.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  ports:
  - number: 5432
    name: tcp
    protocol: TCP

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: api-router
spec:
  hosts:
  - api1.example.com
  - api2.example.com
  http:
  - match:
    - port: 443
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api1.example.com
      weight: 80
    - destination:
        host: api2.example.com
      weight: 20

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: db-router
spec:
  hosts:
  - db.example.com
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 5432
    route:
    - destination:
        host: db.example.com
        port:
          number: 5432
